step_rationale: Associated with atherosclerosis plaque progression; function in lipid/inflammation axis.
mechanism: ARL6IP1 participates in lipid homeostasis and inflammatory signaling during atherosclerotic plaque development.

references.title: Identification of Key Genes as Early Warning Signals of Acute Myocardial Infarction Based on Weighted Gene Correlation Network Analysis and Dynamic Network Biomarker Algorithm.
